title: centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. tenuiflorum
intro: Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. tenuiflorum, also known as Irish gentian or gentian violet, is a flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. tenuiflorum include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Centaurium tenuiflorum subsp. tenuiflorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal purposes.
